How can we help?

Find answers to common questions about creating your personalized story.

Getting StartedYour StoryPrinting & QualityShippingPricingPrivacy & Data

Getting Started

Upload a photo of your child, choose a story theme, and we generate a fully illustrated personalized story. Your child appears as an illustrated character on every page, keeping their unique appearance throughout the whole book.
Your first free story is ready in under 3 minutes. Full stories with more pages and higher quality take about 10-15 minutes. You'll receive an email when your story is ready.
Stories can be created for children of all ages. You can adjust the reading level to match your child — from simple picture books for toddlers to longer stories for school-age children.

Your Story

Yes! You can add your whole family — children, parents, grandparents, siblings, or friends. Each character gets their own illustrated appearance based on their photo.
We offer 8+ styles including Pixar-style 3D, watercolor, comic, anime, and more. Each style is applied consistently across all pages of your story.
Yes. You can regenerate individual pages, adjust illustrations, and fine-tune the story to your liking before ordering a printed version.

Printing & Quality

Books are professionally printed on high-quality paper in 20x20cm format. You can choose between hardcover and softcover binding. Print quality is comparable to professionally published children's books.
Yes. Every story can be downloaded as a high-resolution PDF, perfect for reading on tablets or printing at home.

Shipping

We currently ship printed books within Switzerland. International shipping is available at additional cost. You can also download your story as a PDF to read on any device.

Pricing

Your first story is completely free — no account needed. After that, stories are created with credits. Printed books start at CHF 28 for softcover and CHF 43 for hardcover, plus a flat CHF 10 shipping per order within Switzerland (pay shipping only once when ordering multiple books). See our pricing page for details.

Privacy & Data

Yes. Your photos are used only to create your story illustrations and are never shared, sold, or used for any other purpose. We take privacy seriously — see our Privacy Policy for details.

Still have questions?

We're happy to help. Send us an email and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
